description_long: This object is a classic candelabrum with a metallic gold finish, featuring five upright white candles. The central stem is elegantly twisted and rises from a broad, round base that provides stability. Four curved arms extend symmetrically from the central stem, each holding a candle cup with a white candle. The candle cups are shaped to securely hold the candles, and the overall design is reminiscent of traditional brass or bronze candelabras often found in formal urban settings. The candles themselves are tall and slender, with some visible wax drips along their sides. The metallic surface of the holder has a smooth, slightly glossy sheen, suggesting a polished metal material.
description: A gold-finished metal candelabrum with five white candles, featuring a round base and elegantly curved arms. The candles are tall and slender, with visible wax drips.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central candle and base, with two side arms partially visible.
description_view_1: Angled view displaying all five candles and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the central candle and base, with the arms less visible.
description_view_3: Angled view similar to view 1, showing all five candles and the full spread of the arms.
